description: Direct-append case-boundary fixture (CBR §4.6, REFACTOR-TODO 4C.2). Exercises POST /cases/{case_id}/events for a non-workflow-driven post-ledger event. Uses ProvenanceKind::IntakeAccepted (eventLiteral wos.kernel.intake_accepted, schemas/record-kind-registry.json line 77) as the closest existing registered foundation-category kind with an eventLiteral — wos.kernel.note_added is referenced in CBR §4.6 prose but is NOT yet a registered ProvenanceKind. IntakeAccepted models the same authorization shape: foundation category, post-ledger branch, no workflow drain required. The genesis event creates the ledger; the direct-append event appears in the case view without going through any workflow process drain.
